# ANALYSIS: ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER_REAL_FILLS_VALIDATION_LAST_20

**Filed:** 2026-05-21  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** validation_analysis  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

The ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER (long-only only) watcher gate preserves the edge of long ORB signals by excluding short bias. Using chart-stop-only execution (premium_stop_pct=-0.99) avoids premature exits from ORH retest pullbacks, capturing the continuation edge. We validate this on the last 20 long-only ORB signals to confirm P&L and win rate align with the watcher proxy (N=10, WR=90%, P&L=+$273).

## Mechanism

**Entry trigger:** Long ORB signal (orb_watcher.py logs long-only ORB breakouts at 09:35-09:45 ET).  
**Exit logic:** Chart-stop-only: exit when SPY closes a 5m candle below ORH (rejection_level=orh). No premium stop (premium_stop_pct=-0.99 effectively disables it). Time stop at 15:50 ET remains active.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+ account; $1K paper account realizes ~14% of headline P&L (50% per-trade risk cap).
2. **Sample bias:** Last 20 long-only ORB signals by date may overrepresent recent trending regimes (Q2-2026 concentration risk). Selection method: chronological filter on orb_watcher long-only signals. Overfit risk: high if recent regime persists; validation requires OOS confirmation.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (no walk-forward held-out window performed for this specific 20-signal sample).
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (validation requires Stage-1 backtest on last 20 long-only ORB signals with chart-stop-only configuration; data not available in inputs).
5. **Failure modes:** 
   - Worst day: whipsaw ORH retest triggering premature exit (mitigated by chart-stop).
   - Max drawdown: regime shift to choppy markets (ORB failure rate increases).
   - Blow-up scenario: consecutive losses in low-VIX regimes (Q1 2025: N=12 WR=0% -$766).
6. **Concentration:** Q2-2026 alone = 85% of total long-ORB P&L (N=133 WR=86% +$6,245). Without Q2-2026, long-ORB = +$1,133 (thin). Top-5 days likely exceed 50% of P&L in trending regimes.

## Pre-merge gate

- Gym validators: 65/65 PASS (existing for ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER).
- Walk-forward: OOS/IS Sharpe ratio ≥0.50 (existing PASS: 2.916).
- Real-fills: Stage-1 backtest on last 20 long-only ORB signals showing WR ≥60% and P&L >0 (chart-stop-only configuration).

## Confidence

3 / 10 -- No data available for last 20 signal validation; relies on extrapolation from N=10 sample. High concentration risk in Q2-2026 limits generalizability.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Complements ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER (rank 5) by extending real-fills validation. No conflict with existing candidates; validation supports NEEDS-MORE-DATA → PROMISING transition if results confirm WR≥60%. Does not affect watcher-only candidates (#3, #4, #9, #11). Neutral on trigger/exit-change candidates.
